claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A div by default or one consumer element through asChild.
semantics.attributes: The boundary writes native lang and dir plus stable density and reduced-motion data attributes.
semantics.rolePolicy: No role, name, landmark, or focus behavior is inferred.

context.nesting: Unspecified values inherit; messages shallow-merge by stable key; explicit values override only the subtree, including density and reduced-motion CSS variables.
context.portal: The configured container is inherited and Portal writes locale/direction/density onto its DOM boundary.
context.asChildOptOut: asChild=false renders the neutral provider div; element merging is absent and no role, name, event, or focus behavior is inferred.

ssrHydration.determinism: Defaults never read host locale, time zone, media queries, document, or window during render.
ssrHydration.clientBoundary: Context behavior is a client island that remains server-renderable.

consumerResponsibilities: Use locale and time-zone values that match server data serialization and the first client render.
Provide complete official-locale messages before claiming localized production support.
Keep document-level lang and dir synchronized when the provider does not own the document element.
Verify custom classes and asChild elements do not remove semantics or focus visibility.
